Appointments.body: V Narayanan appointed as 11th Chairman of ISRO
Tuhin Kanta Pandey Appointed as 11th Chairman of SEBI replacing Madhabi Puri Buch
ACC Appointed Sivasubramanian Ramann as PFRDA Chairman for 5 yr
Sourav Ganguly Reappointed as ICC Men’s Cricket Committee Chairperson
Dr. Ajay Kumar Appointed as Chairman of UPSC
Kirsty Coventry : First Female and African President of the International Olympic Committee (IOC).
R. Venkataramani : Attorney General Of India
Shri Praveen Vashista : Central Vigilance Commissioner.
Ashok Kr. Lahiri : new Vice Chairman of NITI Aayog.
The 16th Finance Commission chaired by Dr Aravind Panagariya
1. Nitin Naveen appointed National Working President of BJP.
3. CP Radhakrishnan appointed 15th Vice President of India.
4. Satish Kumar - Chairman & CEO, Railway Board.
6. Shiva Subramaniam Raman appointed Chairman, PFRDA.
7. Tuhin Kanta Pandey appointed SEBI Chairman.
